mapper.select: SELECT c.*,u.level_id AS userLevelId,u.header,u.username, IF ( g.id IS NULL, 0, 1 ) AS isSupport FROM waigua_comment c LEFT JOIN waigua_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN waigua_giveLike g ON g.relation_id = c.id AND g.user_id = #{currentUser} AND g.type = 2 WHERE c.del_flag = 0 AND info_id = #{infoId}

SELECT c.* ,u.level_id AS userLevelId,u.header,u.username, IF ( g.id IS NULL, 0, 1 ) AS isSupport ,IFNULL(#{currentUser},'') AS currentUser FROM waigua_comment c LEFT JOIN waigua_user u ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN waigua_giveLike g ON g.relation_id = c.id AND g.user_id = #{currentUser} AND g.type = 2 WHERE c.info_id = #{infoId} AND c.parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT c.* ,u.level_id AS userLevelId,u.header,u.username FROM waigua_comment c LEFT JOIN waigua_user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.id = #{parentId}
